title: Legacy microarray series reanalysis module
context: An optional module to reanalyze legacy open Ewing microarray series, included only if M0 decides arrays are in-scope (PLAN backlog/M4). Same license/consent and provenance rules apply. Binding guardrails: open-access / aggregate / de-identified data only; controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA/biobanks) and identifiable patient data are out of scope; COSMIC/OncoKB/MSigDB-restricted are recipe-reference only; no clinical/diagnostic/prognostic/treatment language; research-only, not medical advice; provenance on every assertion.
objective: Add a reanalysis module for legacy open Ewing microarray series (normalization, QC, expression matrices) conditional on an in-scope decision.
acceptanceCriteria: Module normalizes and QCs ≥1 open microarray series with a reproducible one-command run.
Inclusion is conditional on a recorded M0 scope decision that arrays are in-scope.
Outputs carry provenance manifests; only license-cleared series are processed.
Commit is DCO signed-off; results labelled research-only.
output: A pull request adding the legacy microarray reanalysis module (conditional on arrays being in-scope).
